assessment.summary_for_seller: Good run: you held context, answered on-point, and brought the conversation to a next step.

criteria.evidence_quote: Hi Andrei, I noticed Stellarpath is approaching a Series B and wanted to reach out about contractor documentation.

criteria.evidence_quote: Hi Andrei, I noticed Stellarpath is approaching a Series B and wanted to reach out about contractor documentation.

criteria.name: Compliance and boundary of responsibility
criteria.short_reason: Seller stated Mellow's control scope without overclaiming.
criteria.evidence_quote: Hi Andrei, I noticed Stellarpath is approaching a Series B and wanted to reach out about contractor documentation.
criteria.label: Scope & responsibility boundary

criteria.name: Language fit
criteria.short_reason: Language is adapted to the chosen persona.
criteria.evidence_quote:
Hi Andrei,

There is an SLA — payments have a 48-hour resolution guarantee with a dedicated ops contact. If a payment is stuck past that, it escalates automatically and you get a status update.

Would a 20-minute call make sense to walk through the specifics?

Best, Pavel
criteria.label: Persona language fit

criteria.name: Handling core objections
criteria.short_reason: At least two key objections addressed substantively.
criteria.evidence_quote:
Hi Andrei,

There is an SLA — payments have a 48-hour resolution guarantee with a dedicated ops contact. If a payment is stuck past that, it escalates automatically and you get a status update.

Would a 20-minute call make sense to walk through the specifics?

objections.objection:
Pavel,

Thanks for reaching out. I see you did your homework. Immediate question: payment chain, documents, KYC — What sits within Mellow's scope, and what remains on your side?

Best,
Андрей

Pavel,

Thanks for reaching out. Half an answer. The other half: what exactly don't you take — where does my side begin?

Best,
Андрей

Pavel,

Thanks for reaching out. Ok. But if a payment gets stuck again, what's the operational process?

Is there an SLA or just more promises?

Best,
Андрей

Pavel,

Thanks for reaching out. Send a one-page summary: scope, documents, SLA on incidents. If it's without fluff — we'll find time.

Best,
Андрей

criteria.label: Core objection handling

transcript.text: Hi Andrei, I noticed Stellarpath is approaching a Series B and wanted to reach out about contractor documentation.

Pavel,

Thanks for reaching out. I see you did your homework. Immediate question: payment chain, documents, KYC — What sits within Mellow's scope, and what remains on your side?

Best,
Андрей
Hi Andrei, reaching out about contractor documentation for your Series B.

Pavel,

Thanks for reaching out. Half an answer. The other half: what exactly don't you take — where does my side begin?

Best,
Андрей

Hi Andrei,

Good question. Mellow handles the full contractor payment chain: KYC, document collection, payout execution, and payment status tracking. Your team keeps the relationship and approval decisions.

Happy to walk through what that means in your specific setup.

Best, Pavel

Pavel,

Thanks for reaching out. Ok. But if a payment gets stuck again, what's the operational process?

Is there an SLA or just more promises?

Best,
Андрей

Hi Andrei,

There is an SLA — payments have a 48-hour resolution guarantee with a dedicated ops contact. If a payment is stuck past that, it escalates automatically and you get a status update.

Would a 20-minute call make sense to walk through the specifics?

Best, Pavel

Pavel,

Thanks for reaching out. Send a one-page summary: scope, documents, SLA on incidents. If it's without fluff — we'll find time.

Best,
Андрей
